member_types.note: Both sides of both guards are plain string[]. No coercion needed.

findings.no_existing_set_equality_helper: No sameMembers(), sorted-join, or Set-based identity check exists anywhere in app/src/

recommended_approach.extract_pure_helper: Export membersChanged(stored: string[], current: string[]): boolean from a new app/src/lib/marmot/memberGuard.ts
recommended_approach.rationale: Pure function has no React/IDB deps — test needs zero mocks. Mirrors groupStorage.ts pattern.
